name: Outcome Revision Proof Gate
purpose: Produce direct Project Model and Change Kernel Evidence that pre-activation Outcome revisions are append-only, authority-bound, rederived, and frozen before activation.

oracle.description: The fixed Outcome revision proof test entrypoint must exist and exit zero.

rejects: an Outcome semantic delta without exactly one append-only Revision
a deleted, reordered, rewritten, forked, no-op, or digest-forged Revision chain
a Revision of an active, achieved, or retired Outcome
an Amendment that appends both any Revision and any Outcome status Transition
activation that does not freeze the exact latest frozen-baseline Outcome definition

residualUncertainty: The proof covers the bounded in-process Project Model compiler and local Kernel rederivation; Accepted history portability across workspaces remains an explicit Knowledge Gap.
Human-facing Outcome revision authoring is outside this Gate and belongs to a later Workbench Outcome.

oracle.description: The fixed Change Kernel scenario must prove compile-, Gate-, and acceptance-time rederivation plus frozen-baseline isolation and exit zero.

rejects: a stored Outcome Plan Amendment compilation that differs from Gate-time rederivation
a stored Outcome Plan Amendment compilation that differs from acceptance-time rederivation
a Revision that authorizes an ordinary Change created against an older frozen Governance Baseline
a current-schema Candidate that falls back to a legacy Transition-only compilation

residualUncertainty: The proof covers the local single-writer Change Store and current-host Git observations; authenticated multi-writer history remains outside the current boundary.
Remote execution and human-facing Revision authoring belong to later Outcomes.
